summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Satoshi Lightning Wallet MVP. Backend API testing: 100% pass rate (34/34 tests). Frontend testing: All major flows verified including auth (signup/login), wallet home UI, receive invoice generation, send address decoding, transactions screen, and settings screen. One minor issue found with eye toggle animation timing.

ui_bugs.issue: Eye toggle button on WalletHome doesn't trigger immediate UI update. The API call succeeds and state is persisted, but the balance display doesn't re-render to show/hide dots until page refresh or navigation.
ui_bugs.workaround: Hide balance toggle in Settings screen works correctly and updates display immediately
ui_bugs.root_cause: toggleHideBalance() in AuthContext updates state but WalletHome component doesn't re-render. Settings screen toggle works because it navigates back to home, forcing a refresh.
ui_bugs.fix_suggestion: Ensure WalletHome re-renders when hideBalance state changes, or force a component update after toggleHideBalance() completes

success_percentage.frontend: 98% (All major flows working, 1 UI re-render bug in eye toggle)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix WalletHome eye toggle: The eye toggle button on WalletHome doesn't trigger immediate UI re-render. The toggleHideBalance() function updates state and API successfully, but the balance display doesn't update until page refresh. Settings screen toggle works correctly. Likely needs to ensure WalletHome component re-renders when hideBalance state changes in AuthContext.

additional_notes.lnurl_pay: ✅ LNURL-pay endpoints working correctly for receiving payments
additional_notes.auth_security: ✅ PIN validation, duplicate username rejection, and token-based auth working
